API Reference

This page documents all public functions in the mylib package.

mylib.fetch(url, timeout=10)

Fetch a resource from the given URL. Returns the response body as bytes.

Parameters

NameTypeDescription
urlstrThe URL to fetch.
timeoutfloatRequest timeout in seconds.

Example

import mylib
data = mylib.fetch("https://example.com/data.json")
print(data)

mylib.parse(data)

Parse raw bytes into a structured dictionary. Supports JSON and XML formats.

Raises ValueError if the input cannot be parsed.

MyLib Documentation — MIT License
